title: Pendulum
profTagline: A contemplative pendulum that swings between opposites — one breath to each swing. Draw a thought in, cast it out; will to life and will to death, creation and ruin, everything and nothing. Breathe with it. Entirely on your device and offline.
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
